import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn tokenize(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws(s, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    let start = i
    while i < n and not is_ws(s, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if start < i
      let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
  end
  result
end

fn get_or_zero(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(x)
  x
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(x)
  x
when None
  ""
end

let a = tokenize(line1)
let b = tokenize(line2)
let len = a.len()
mut i = 0
while i < len
  let x = get_or_zero(a, i)
  let y = get_or_zero(b, i)
  let s = x + y
  println("#{x}+#{y}=#{s}")
  i = i + 1
end
